data.title: Marathon Petroleum Stock Is Trending Overnight: Here's Why
data.description: Marathon Petroleum Corp. (NYSE: MPC) saw a slight increase in its shares on Thursday, with an overnight trading price of $242.67, up by 0.36% from the previous day. The Ohio-based company, dealing in downstream and midstream energy, experienced a notable 3.96% rise as its stock closed at $241.81 during the regular trading session. MPC announced a quarterly dividend of $1 per share to be paid on Jun. 10 to shareholders of record as of May 20. This increase comes after discussions between President Donald Trump and top officials, including Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent, Vice President JD Vance, and envoys Jared Kushner and Steve Witkoff, with oil and gas executives such as Chevron's CEO Mike Wirth, about maintaining an Iran blockade for an extended period if necessary. The broader energy sector also witnessed a positive trend on Wednesday, with Chevron rising by 2.05%, Exxon Mobil gaining 2.72%, and other industry players following suit.

data.title: ASAPP Featured on "All Access with Andy Garcia" to Discuss the Future of Customer Service and the Role of Generative AI
data.description: On April 30, 2026, in New York, ASAPP, a Customer Experience Platform (CXP) known for AI customer service solutions for businesses, will be highlighted in an upcoming episode of "All Access with Andy Garcia." The program will delve into the ways in which AI technology is transforming the customer experience landscape. ASAPP's innovative approach to enhancing customer service for enterprises through AI will be a focal point of the discussion. Stay tuned for more insights on this topic in the upcoming broadcast.

data.title: Suade sets the standard for agentic AI as the only AI-native regulatory reporting platform
data.description: London, on April 30, 2026 - Suade, a cutting-edge platform revolutionizing regulatory reporting for financial institutions with an API-first design, is leading the way in agentic AI as the sole AI-native platform available. Established in 2014, Suade has been AI-native and cloud-native from its inception, standing out in the market for its innovative approach.

data.title: 3 Rare Earth Metals Keeping Pentagon Planners Up At Night
data.description: FN Media Group is introducing the latest market commentary from Oilprice.com on April 30, 2026. The recent turmoil at the Strait of Hormuz following unsuccessful peace negotiations served as a stark reminder of the impact of chokepoints. This led to a rapid increase in oil prices, which subsequently stabilized as tensions eased. The news highlights the volatility of the oil market, showcasing the significant influence of geopolitical events on global energy prices.

data.title: Accountants Streamline Cash Flow with ezACH Direct Deposit Software
data.description: A new ACH solution is now available for modern accounting workflows, promising to eliminate payment delays and reduce manual errors. Developed by Halfpricesoft.com, based in REDMOND, Wash., this solution aims to provide businesses with faster payments and improved control over their finances. Released on April 30, 2026, this low-cost, high-quality system is tailored to meet the demands of the industry. With this solution, businesses can expect streamlined processes and enhanced efficiency in their financial operations.

data.title: In Celebration of Military Appreciation Month, Resort for a Day Launches 10% Military Discount on Day Passes
data.description: To commemorate Military Appreciation Month, Resort for a Day, a leading provider of resort day passes, is launching a new year-round program offering exclusive discounts on resort experiences worldwide for active-duty service members and veterans. The initiative, announced on April 30, 2026, in Fort Lauderdale, Florida, aims to provide special savings to military personnel. This program showcases the company's commitment to honoring those who have served their country. Military members can now enjoy discounted rates on various resort experiences through this initiative.

data.title: Neusoft Smart Go and Tencent Cloud Forge Strategic Partnership to Build a New AI-Powered Intelligent Cockpit Ecosystem
data.description: Neusoft Smart Go, a subsidiary of Neusoft Corporation (SSE:600718), revealed its strategic upgrade at Auto China 2026 in Beijing on April 30, 2026. The company's new goal is to establish itself as a top global supplier in full-domain upper-body electronics solutions.

data.title: PB Master Program Debuts: Xtep's New Global Support Platform for Marathon Runners
data.description: In Bergen, Norway on April 30, 2026, Xtep, a renowned global performance running brand, introduced PB Master, its latest flagship program within the X-RUN initiative, during the 2026 Bergen City Marathon. The debut of PB Master at the marathon generated significant excitement among locals, showcasing the brand's commitment to enhancing running experiences.

data.title: Hexagon releases new targets at its Capital Markets Day 2026
data.description: Hexagon, a prominent company in precision measurement, positioning, and autonomous solutions, holds a significant position in the global market with a projected serviceable addressable market value of approximately €38 billion by 2030. The company currently generates a revenue of €3.7 billion and has a workforce of around 17,000 employees spread across three main Business Areas - Manufacturing Intelligence, Infrastructure, and Especial.

data.title: Eldridge Enters Swiss Market with Three Development Loans to LIKA
data.description: Eldridge Real Estate Credit, the real estate investing arm of Eldridge Capital Management, revealed today their provision of three loans amounting to CHF 113.7 million to LIKA. These funds are designated for the construction of residential-centric properties in various locations across Switzerland. This move signifies Eldridge’s initiation into the Swiss market, expanding their already established presence in the US, UK, and Europe. Notably, LIKA, active since 2012, has successfully completed over 200 structures in Switzerland, aiding in the country's real estate growth.

data.title: Atour Lifestyle Holdings Limited Releases 2025 Environmental, Social and Governance Report
data.description: Announced on April 30, 2026, Atour Lifestyle Holdings Limited, a prominent lifestyle group in China trading on NASDAQ under ATAT, has unveiled its 2025 Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) report. Detailing the Company's management principles and notable accomplishments in environmental conservation, societal accountability, and governance standards for the period concluding on December 31, 2025, the report underscores Atour's intensified commitment to embedding sustainability principles into its future growth trajectory.
